demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I've had to run to the toilet ten times since dinner, it's completely liquid, and I feel so weak and dizzy I can barely stand up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The diarrhoea came on suddenly this evening and hasn't stopped, and now I feel weak and dizzy and I'm on my own tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 5 hours ago, not long after dinner
symptom_narrative.character: completely liquid, watery motions — no blood and nothing black that I can see
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: about ten times since dinner; I feel so weak and dizzy I can barely stand up
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: cramping low down in my tummy just before I have to go
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: keeps coming in urgent waves since dinner
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: I tried some Imodium from the cupboard but it barely helped
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: nothing I've noticed — it just keeps coming
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: tired and wrung out, dizzy when I stand up; no vomiting, no fever or shivers
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had bouts of loose motions before over the years — a few years ago they did a bowel biopsy and said the lining was a bit inflamed and it could usually be managed with diet and a stomach medicine
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm resting on the sofa; I can't really get up and about, and I'm worried about coping on my own overnight

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a long-standing bowel problem that gives me bouts of watery diarrhoea
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: a few years ago, after a bowel biopsy
past_medical_history.how_managed: usually settles with diet changes and an over-the-counter stomach medicine

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; managing independently but worried about getting through the night by herself if this keeps up

objective_data_offered.value: completely liquid and watery, no blood and nothing black or tarry that I can see
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own visual description over chat; not clinician-inspected

objective_data_offered.value: about ten times since dinner, roughly the last five hours
I've still been passing some urine; last went to wee about an hour ago
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported estimate; volume and concentration not measured
